name: Sausage & Wild Rice Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Precook the wild rice according to package instructions.
2. In a large skillet, sauté onion in butter until translucent.
3. Add mushrooms and sausage meat; fry until the sausage is cooked through.
4. Combine the precooked wild rice, sausage mixture, parsley, sage, salt, and pepper.
5. This stuffing pairs well with chicken, turkey, duck, or squab.
(To order Wild Rice, write: Ray Leinbach, rt1 box 202, Blackduck, MN, 56630)
